title: Remove dependency on c/buildah
body:
After https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/789, we don’t need that dependency for any _code_.

But c/buildah is dragging in newer versions of several (non-module) dependencies than this repo would otherwise use, because c/image requires older versions. So, just dropping c/buildah would cause several dependencies to be downgraded.

So, we need to work on updating the c/image dependencies manually, and drop the c/buildah dependency only after new c/image is released and updated here, so that removing the c/buildah dependency does not cause downgrades.

comments.body: This can happen after we update to c/image with https://github.com/containers/image/pull/874 .
